# OmniWebKit LLM Documentation

## Project Overview
OmniWebKit is a collection of free, client-side online tools for developers, designers, and general users.
URL: https://omniwebkit.com

## Tools Available
We offer a wide range of tools including:
- PDF Tools: PDF Editor, PDF to Word, Image to PDF, etc.
- Image Tools: Converter, Compressor, Resizer, etc.
- Developer Tools: JSON Formatter, JWT Decoder, Regex Tester, etc.
- SEO Tools: Meta Tag Extractor, Sitemap Generator, Robots.txt Generator, etc.
- Text Tools: Case Converter, Word Counter, etc.
- Math/Calculators: BMI Calculator, Aspect Ratio Calculator, etc.

## core Principles
- Privacy First: Most tools run entirely in the browser (client-side).
- Free: All tools are free to use.
- Accessible: Designed to be easy to use for everyone.

## Contact
For support or inquiries, please visit https://omniwebkit.com/contact
